channel.title: Night Feather Stories
channel.description: Relaxing bedtime stories to calm your mind and help you drift to sleep. Narrated with care for peaceful nights.
channel.itunes:author: Night Feather Stories

item.title: When the kitchen eggs found their colors | Sleep Story
item.description:
Welcome. Let this calm story ease your thoughts.

The smooth white eggs waited silently, a promise of spring yet unfulfilled. One quiet morning, a decision formed to give them their true colors.

Step into a quiet moment where Saturday light touches smooth, white eggs. Feel the gentle anticipation in the air, a soft invitation to a cherished spring tradition. This story unfolds slowly, like colors spreading on a canvas, offering a serene escape. Find peace in the simple joy of creating.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 Intro
00:40 Story
40:00 Gentle transition
50:00 Ambient music

🌙 New sleep stories every week.

Playlist:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLf-J69yzrrFOmpdwKNyx1c7iWlk46U4tt

#sleepstories #bedtimestories #PaintedEggs #QuietMorning #SpringTraditions #featherStoriesGroup

item.title: The silent music box that played again | Sleep Story
item.description:
A relaxing sleep story designed to help you unwind and fall asleep.

Tonight you'll hear "The silent music box that played again."

Let this story be a quiet refuge. In a room filled with the soft sound of rain, a dark wooden music box sits in the shadows, covered in a fine layer of dust. Its silence is ancient, holding the memory of a forgotten melody. Come closer and listen to the story held within the quiet house, a tale waiting to be heard once more.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 Intro
00:40 Story
40:00 Gentle transition
50:00 Ambient music

🌙 New sleep stories every week.

If you enjoy calm bedtime stories and peaceful storytelling designed to help you relax and fall asleep, consider subscribing for more quiet tales.

#sleepstories #bedtimestories #relaxingstories #asmr #storytelling #musicbox #relaxingstory #ambience

item.title: A Map to a Place That Shouldn't Exist | Sleep Story
item.description:
A relaxing sleep story designed to help you unwind and fall asleep.

Tonight you'll hear "A Map to a Place That Shouldn't Exist."

Let this story be a quiet refuge for you. A place built from the scent of old paper, the rough texture of a clothbound book, and the soft light of a fading afternoon. Within these moments, a discovery awaits. A journey that begins not with a step, but with the gentle unfolding of a map that has waited years to be found. A quiet story made to help you relax.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 Intro
00:40 Story
40:00 Gentle transition
50:00 Ambient music

🌙 New sleep stories every week.

If you enjoy calm bedtime stories and peaceful storytelling designed to help you relax and fall asleep, consider subscribing for more quiet tales.

#sleepstories #bedtimestories #relaxingstories #asmr #storytelling #oldmap #storytelling #library

item.title: No one looked at this photo for decades | Sleep Story
The clock hadn't worked for years... then it started ticking again | Sleep Story
item.description: A relaxing sleep story to help you unwind and fall asleep. Tonight's story: The clock hadn't worked for years then it started ticking again.

item.title: The Forgotten Notebook Found in the Silent Attic | Sleep Story
item.description:
A relaxing sleep story designed to help you unwind and fall asleep.

Tonight you'll hear "The Forgotten Notebook Found in the Silent Attic."

In the quiet stillness of an attic, a forgotten wooden box held a secret. Discover the elegant script of a faded blue notebook, filled with simple, comforting recipes. Feel the texture of old paper and the gentle scent of time as we bring a quiet kitchen back to life, filling the air with warmth and simple joy.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 Intro
00:40 Story
40:00 Gentle transition
50:00 Ambient music

🌙 New sleep stories every week.

If you enjoy calm bedtime stories and peaceful storytelling designed to help you relax and fall asleep, consider subscribing for more quiet tales.

#sleepstories #bedtimestories #relaxingstories #asmr #storytelling #storytelling #relaxation #cozycooking

item.title: The Forgotten Chest in the Closet | Sleep Story
The Forgotten Music Box That Began to Play Again | Sleep Story
The Clock Forgotten in the Attic for Decades
item.description: A relaxing story set in a calm and peaceful atmosphere. Tonight you'll hear: The Clock Forgotten in the Attic for Decades. New relaxing stories every week.
